svg.title: Smart Pet Ball Launcher — Architecture
svg.desc: Horizontal architecture diagram: Sensors feed the STM32 MCU, which drives Turret, Launch, Ball Feed modules and a UI layer, all powered by a 12V supply.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the power supply')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the STM32 Nucleo-U545RE-Q')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the turret control module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the launch module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ball feed module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the UI and logging module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the PIR motion sensor')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ultrasonic sensor')
